data.title: audit: normalize skogai-caveman `skogai-vision` skill and naming
data.description:
Repo: `/home/skogix/.local/src/marketplace/plugins/skogai-caveman`

The repo now contains `skills/skogai-vision/`, while `README.md` and `CLAUDE.md` still refer to `project-vision`.

Scope:

* audit `skills/skogai-vision/` including workflows, references, and template
* resolve naming drift between `skogai-vision` and `project-vision`
* ensure this skill is treated as the first planning artifact (`docs/VISION.md` before deeper planning)
* update any dependent docs or routing references as needed

Done when the vision skill and its naming are internally consistent across the repo.
